title: İç Denge ve Risk
description: Internal equity, cinsiyet farkı, maaş sıkışması, compa-ratio dağılımı ve ayrılma riski analizi.

aggregate.join: CROSS JOIN (SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN dept_avg.dept_avg > 0 THEN epr.SALARY / dept_avg.dept_avg ELSE NULL END) AS avg_compa FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID INNER JOIN (SELECT DEPARTMENT_ID, AVG(SALARY) AS dept_avg FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr2 INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep2 ON ep2.PUANTAJ_ID = epr2.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep2.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep2.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND epr2.SALARY > 0 GROUP BY DEPARTMENT_ID) dept_avg ON dept_avg.DEPARTMENT_ID = epr.DEPARTMENT_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND epr.SALARY > 0) cr_sub

CROSS JOIN (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID INNER JOIN (SELECT DEPARTMENT_ID, AVG(SALARY) AS dept_avg FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr2 INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep2 ON ep2.PUANTAJ_ID = epr2.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep2.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep2.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND epr2.SALARY > 0 GROUP BY DEPARTMENT_ID) dept_avg ON dept_avg.DEPARTMENT_ID = epr.DEPARTMENT_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND epr.SALARY > 0 AND dept_avg.dept_avg > 0 AND epr.SALARY / dept_avg.dept_avg < 0.80) cb_sub

aggregate.select: 1.0 - (AVG(CASE WHEN ed.SEX = 0 THEN SALARY END) / NULLIF(AVG(CASE WHEN ed.SEX = 1 THEN SALARY END), 0))
aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0
aggregate.join: INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].PUANTAJ_ID INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES] e ON e.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_DETAIL] ed ON ed.EMPLOYEE_ID = e.EMPLOYEE_ID

CROSS JOIN (SELECT TOP 1 PERCENTILE_CONT(0.90) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY SALARY) OVER() AS p90, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.10) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY SALARY) OVER() AS p10 FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0) pct_sub

CROSS JOIN (SELECT (2.0 * SUM(s.rn * s.SALARY) / (MAX(s.cnt) * SUM(s.SALARY))) - ((MAX(s.cnt) + 1.0) / MAX(s.cnt)) AS gini_val FROM (SELECT SALARY, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SALARY) AS rn, COUNT(*) OVER () AS cnt FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0) s) gini_sub

CROSS JOIN (SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN eio.START_DATE >= DATEADD(YEAR, -1, GETDATE()) THEN epr.SALARY END) / NULLIF(AVG(CASE WHEN eio.START_DATE < DATEADD(YEAR, -5, GETDATE()) THEN epr.SALARY END), 0) AS compression FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT] eio ON eio.EMPLOYEE_ID = epr.EMPLOYEE_ID AND eio.FINISH_DATE IS NULL WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND epr.SALARY > 0) comp_sub

CROSS JOIN (SELECT COUNT(*) AS risk_count FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT] eio ON eio.EMPLOYEE_ID = epr.EMPLOYEE_ID AND eio.FINISH_DATE IS NULL WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND epr.SALARY > 0 AND epr.SALARY < (SELECT TOP 1 PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY SALARY) OVER() FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr3 INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep3 ON ep3.PUANTAJ_ID = epr3.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep3.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep3.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0) AND DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) >= 3) risk_sub

CROSS JOIN (SELECT (AVG(CASE WHEN eio.START_DATE >= DATEADD(YEAR, -1, GETDATE()) THEN epr.SALARY END) - AVG(CASE WHEN eio.START_DATE < DATEADD(YEAR, -1, GETDATE()) THEN epr.SALARY END)) / NULLIF(AVG(CASE WHEN eio.START_DATE < DATEADD(YEAR, -1, GETDATE()) THEN epr.SALARY END), 0) AS gap_pct FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT] eio ON eio.EMPLOYEE_ID = epr.EMPLOYEE_ID AND eio.FINISH_DATE IS NULL WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND epr.SALARY > 0) gap_sub

CROSS JOIN (SELECT CASE WHEN ratio < 0.70 THEN '<0.70' WHEN ratio < 0.80 THEN '0.70-0.80' WHEN ratio < 0.90 THEN '0.80-0.90' WHEN ratio < 1.00 THEN '0.90-1.00' WHEN ratio < 1.10 THEN '1.00-1.10' WHEN ratio < 1.20 THEN '1.10-1.20' ELSE '1.20+' END AS label, COUNT(*) AS value, MIN(CASE WHEN ratio < 0.70 THEN 1 WHEN ratio < 0.80 THEN 2 WHEN ratio < 0.90 THEN 3 WHEN ratio < 1.00 THEN 4 WHEN ratio < 1.10 THEN 5 WHEN ratio < 1.20 THEN 6 ELSE 7 END) AS sort_order FROM (SELECT epr.SALARY / NULLIF(dept_med.dept_median, 0) AS ratio FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID LEFT JOIN (SELECT DEPARTMENT_ID, AVG(SALARY) AS dept_median FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr2 INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep2 ON ep2.PUANTAJ_ID = epr2.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep2.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep2.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND epr2.SALARY > 0 GROUP BY DEPARTMENT_ID) dept_med ON dept_med.DEPARTMENT_ID = epr.DEPARTMENT_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND epr.SALARY > 0 AND dept_med.dept_median > 0) x GROUP BY CASE WHEN ratio < 0.70 THEN '<0.70' WHEN ratio < 0.80 THEN '0.70-0.80' WHEN ratio < 0.90 THEN '0.80-0.90' WHEN ratio < 1.00 THEN '0.90-1.00' WHEN ratio < 1.10 THEN '1.00-1.10' WHEN ratio < 1.20 THEN '1.10-1.20' ELSE '1.20+' END) cr_sub

aggregate.select: ISNULL(NULLIF(RTRIM(ROW_DEPARTMENT_HEAD),''), 'Belirtilmemiş') AS label, AVG(CASE WHEN ed.SEX = 1 THEN SALARY END) AS value, AVG(CASE WHEN ed.SEX = 0 THEN SALARY END) AS value2
aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0
aggregate.join: INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].PUANTAJ_ID INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES] e ON e.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_DETAIL] ed ON ed.EMPLOYEE_ID = e.EMPLOYEE_ID

aggregate.select: ISNULL(NULLIF(RTRIM(ROW_DEPARTMENT_HEAD),''), 'Belirtilmemiş') AS label, AVG(CASE WHEN eio.START_DATE >= DATEADD(YEAR, -1, GETDATE()) THEN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].SALARY END) AS value, AVG(CASE WHEN eio.START_DATE < DATEADD(YEAR, -1, GETDATE()) THEN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].SALARY END) AS value2
aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].SALARY > 0 AND eio.FINISH_DATE IS NULL
aggregate.join: INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].PUANTAJ_ID INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT] eio ON eio.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].EMPLOYEE_ID AND eio.FINISH_DATE IS NULL

charts.title: Kıdem Bandı — Ort. Maaş + Kişi Sayısı

aggregate.select: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 1 THEN '0-1 yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 3 THEN '1-3 yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 5 THEN '3-5 yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 10 THEN '5-10 yıl' ELSE '10+ yıl' END AS label, AVG([workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].SALARY) AS value, COUNT(*) AS value2
aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].SALARY > 0 AND eio.FINISH_DATE IS NULL
aggregate.join: INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].PUANTAJ_ID INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT] eio ON eio.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].EMPLOYEE_ID AND eio.FINISH_DATE IS NULL
aggregate.groupBy: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 1 THEN '0-1 yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 3 THEN '1-3 yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 5 THEN '3-5 yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 10 THEN '5-10 yıl' ELSE '10+ yıl' END

aggregate.select: ISNULL(NULLIF(RTRIM(ROW_DEPARTMENT_HEAD),''), 'Belirtilmemiş') AS label, MIN(SALARY) AS min_val, AVG(SALARY) AS value, MAX(SALARY) AS max_val
aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0

aggregate.join: CROSS JOIN (SELECT ISNULL(NULLIF(RTRIM(epr.ROW_DEPARTMENT_HEAD),''), 'Belirtilmemiş') AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT] eio ON eio.EMPLOYEE_ID = epr.EMPLOYEE_ID AND eio.FINISH_DATE IS NULL WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND epr.SALARY > 0 AND epr.SALARY < (SELECT TOP 1 PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY SALARY) OVER() FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr3 INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep3 ON ep3.PUANTAJ_ID = epr3.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep3.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep3.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0) AND DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) >= 3 GROUP BY ISNULL(NULLIF(RTRIM(epr.ROW_DEPARTMENT_HEAD),''), 'Belirtilmemiş')) risk_dept

aggregate.select: CASE epos.COLLAR_TYPE WHEN 1 THEN 'Beyaz Yaka' WHEN 2 THEN 'Mavi Yaka' ELSE 'Belirtilmemiş' END AS label, AVG(CASE WHEN ed.SEX = 1 THEN SALARY END) AS value, AVG(CASE WHEN ed.SEX = 0 THEN SALARY END) AS value2
aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0
aggregate.join: INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].PUANTAJ_ID INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES] e ON e.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_DETAIL] ed ON ed.EMPLOYEE_ID = e.EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS] epos ON epos.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].EMPLOYEE_ID AND epos.POSITION_STATUS = 1

aggregate.select: CASE ed.LAST_SCHOOL WHEN 2 THEN 'Lise' WHEN 3 THEN 'Önlisans' WHEN 4 THEN 'Lisans' WHEN 5 THEN 'Y.Lisans' WHEN 6 THEN 'Doktora' ELSE 'Diğer' END AS label, AVG(CASE WHEN ed.SEX = 1 THEN SALARY END) AS value, AVG(CASE WHEN ed.SEX = 0 THEN SALARY END) AS value2
aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0
aggregate.join: INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].PUANTAJ_ID INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES] e ON e.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_DETAIL] ed ON ed.EMPLOYEE_ID = e.EMPLOYEE_ID

collarType.join: LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS] epos ON epos.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].EMPLOYEE_ID AND epos.POSITION_STATUS = 1
